phrases.intent_en: Ask where the payment counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿me indica dónde está la caja para pagar?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, meh een-DEE-kah DON-deh eh-STAH la KAH-hah pa-rah pa-GAR?

likely_response.local: Junto al mostrador de recepción, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Right at the entrance, facing the door.

responses.english: Right at the entrance, facing the door.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Junto al mostrador de recepción, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the workshop demonstration area is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la zona de demostración del taller?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh es-TAH lah SOH-nah deh deh-mohs-trah-SYOHN dehl tah-YAIR?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del pasillo, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Al fondo del pasillo, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how the damascene technique works
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría explicarme cómo funciona la técnica del damasquinado?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, po-DREE-ah eks-pli-KAR-me KO-mo foon-SYOH-nah la tek-NEE-kah del dah-mah-skee-NAH-doh?

likely_response.local: Se incrusta oro en acero mediante martilleo manual.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEH eenth-ROO-stah OH-roh EHN ah-THEH-roh meh-dee-AHN-teh mahr-teel-LEH-oh mah-noo-AHL
likely_response.translation_en: Gold is inlaid into steel via manual hammering.

responses.english: Gold is inlaid into steel via manual hammering.
responses.phonetic: SEH eenth-ROO-stah OH-roh EHN ah-THEH-roh meh-dee-AHN-teh mahr-teel-LEH-oh mah-noo-AHL
responses.french: Se incrusta oro en acero mediante martilleo manual.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if custom orders are possible
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿aceptan pedidos personalizados o bajo encargo aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ah-sep-TAHN peh-DEE-dohs pehr-so-nah-lee-SAH-dohs oh BAH-hoh en-KAHR-goh ah-KEE?

likely_response.local: Sí, hable con el maestro artesano.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ AHB-leh KOHN EHL mah-EH-stroh ahr-teh-SAH-noh
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, speak with the master artisan.

responses.english: Yes, speak with the master artisan.
responses.phonetic: SÍ AHB-leh KOHN EHL mah-EH-stroh ahr-teh-SAH-noh
responses.french: Sí, hable con el maestro artesano.
